2604.18467.title: An Integrated Deep-Learning Framework for Peptide-Protein Interaction Prediction and Target-Conditioned Peptide Generation with ConGA-PePPI and TC-PepGen
2604.18467.paper_summary: Motivation: Peptide-protein interactions (PepPIs) are central to cellular regulation and peptide therapeutics, but experimental characterization remains too slow for large-scale screening. Existing methods usually emphasize either interaction prediction or peptide generation, leaving candidate prioritization, residue-level interpretation, and target-conditioned expansion insufficiently integrated. Results: We present an integrated framework for early-stage peptide screening that combines a partner-aware prediction and localization model (ConGA-PepPI) with a target-conditioned generative model (TC-PepGen). ConGA-PepPI uses asymmetric encoding, bidirectional cross-attention, and progressive transfer from pair prediction to binding-site localization, while TC-PepGen preserves target information throughout autoregressive decoding via layerwise conditioning. In five-fold cross-validation, ConGA-PepPI achieved 0.839 accuracy and 0.921 AUROC, with binding-site AUPR values of 0.601 on the protein side and 0.950 on the peptide side, and remained competitive on external benchmarks. Under a controlled length-conditioned benchmark, 40.39% of TC-PepGen peptides exceeded native templates in AlphaFold 3 ipTM, and unconstrained generation retained evidence of target-conditioned signal.
2604.18467.paper_summary_zh: 動機：肽-蛋白質相互作用（PepPIs）對於細胞調控和肽類治療至關重要，但實驗特徵化對於大規模篩選來說仍然過於緩慢。現有的方法通常強調互動預測或肽的生成，導致候選優先排序、殘基級解釋和目標條件擴展的整合不足。結果：我們提出了一個整合框架，用於早期階段的肽篩選，該框架結合了伴侶感知預測和定位模型（ConGA-PepPI）與目標條件生成模型（TC-PepGen）。ConGA-PepPI 使用非對稱編碼、雙向交叉注意力和從配對預測到結合位點定位的漸進式轉移，而 TC-PepGen 在自回歸解碼過程中通過層級條件保持目標信息。在五折交叉驗證中，ConGA-PepPI 達到了 0.839 的準確率和 0.921 的 AUROC，蛋白質端的結合位點 AUPR 值為 0.601，肽端為 0.950，並在外部基準測試中保持競爭力。在一個受控的長度條件基準下，40.39% 的 TC-PepGen 肽超過了 AlphaFold 3 ipTM 中的本地模板，而無約束生成保留了目標條件信號的證據。
2604.18467.author: Chupei Tang et.al.
2604.18467.authors: Chupei Tang, Junxiao Kong, Moyu Tang, Di Wang, Jixiu Zhai, Ronghao Xie, Shangkun Sima, Tianchi Lu
